name: OpenClaw Feishu Collaboration
description: Passive group transcript capture, mention-based reply gate, cross-bot @-back, and graduated loop guard for Feishu/Lark.

configSchema.description: Zero-topology config: no chat_id / open_id / app_id allowlists. All routing is runtime-discovered.

mode.description: Reply gate behavior. Only mode supported: mention-only — in groups, the bot replies only when @-mentioned. P2P chats always reply.

atBackHumans.description: Prepend an @-mention of the originating user to replies in groups.

atBackBots.description: Prepend an @-mention of the originating peer bot to replies in groups.

enabled.description: Master switch for the graduated brake on bot-bot chains.

maxDepth.description: At this depth the @-back is dropped; the next turn is hard-skipped so the conversation fades.

softHintAtDepth.description: Depth at which the first soft 'consider wrapping up' hint is injected; the stronger hint fires at softHintAtDepth+1.
